name: PropNex Limited
summary: PropNex Limited provides real estate services in Singapore and internationally. It operates through five segments: Real Estate Agency Services, Real Estate Project Marketing Services, Administrative Support Services, Property Management Services, and Training Services. The Real Estate Agency Services segment engages in the sale and lease of public and private residential and commercial/industrial properties, including housing and development board flats and executive condominiums, private condominiums, landed properties, retail shops, offices, and factories. The Real Estate Project Marketing Services is involved in the sale of new private residential development projects for third-party property developers. The Administrative Support Services provides space and other ancillary services. The Property Management segment offers property management, building diagnostics, and facility management solutions, including property, M&E and facility maintenance, communal and lifestyle services, security management, defects resolution, project management, absentee landlord management system, contractors' accreditation, and facility management system. The Training Services segment offers real estate related courses and training programs to salespersons. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Singapore. PropNex Limited is a subsidiary of P&N Holdings Pte. Ltd.
